sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41509" key="e)pifqegmatiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπι-φθεγματικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n41509.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">containing a refrain,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">[σύστημα]</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> </bibl> </cit> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Poëm.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:7:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
